Pagination.name: onPageChange
Pagination.description: Called when the user selects a new page.

Button.name: startIcon
Button.description: Icono renderizado a la izquierda del label. Mutuamente excluyente con endIcon.

Button.name: endIcon
Button.description: Icono renderizado a la derecha del label. Mutuamente excluyente con startIcon.

Accordion.name: title
Accordion.description: Label shown in the header trigger.

Accordion.name: subtitle
Accordion.description: Optional supporting text below the title.

Accordion.name: icon
Accordion.description: Optional icon anchored to the left of the header.

Accordion.name: slotRight
Accordion.description: Optional content placed between the text group and the chevron. If the slot contains interactive elements, call `event.stopPropagation()` on their handlers to prevent toggling the accordion.

Accordion.name: children
Accordion.description: Panel body — revealed when the accordion is open.

Accordion.name: onOpenChange
Accordion.description: Called when the accordion opens or closes.

Uploader.name: fileInfo
Uploader.description: File type + size shown in subtitle (e.g. "JPG 5 MB")

Uploader.name: progress
Uploader.description: Upload progress 0–100, drives the lg loading bar

Uploader.name: thumbnail
Uploader.description: Image src shown in the lg uploaded thumbnail

Uploader.name: icon
Uploader.description: Custom left icon. Defaults to ImageIcon.

Uploader.name: onSelect
Uploader.description: Called when the select/retry button or sm trailing icon is clicked

Uploader.name: errorMessage
Uploader.description: Error reason shown as subtitle in error state, e.g. "Supera los 5 MB"

Tooltip.name: children
Tooltip.description: Main text or content of the tooltip.

Tooltip.name: icon
Tooltip.description: Optional decorative element in the left slot (constrained to 40×40px). Typically an icon, illustration, or avatar image.

Tooltip.name: onClose
Tooltip.description: Shows a close (×) button on the right and calls this handler when clicked. When omitted, no close button is rendered.

Tooltip.name: arrowPosition
Tooltip.description: Position of the directional arrow caret on the bubble. When omitted, no arrow is rendered.

Snackbar.name: icon
Snackbar.description: Decorative icon rendered on the left. Shown when neither `avatar` nor `loading` is active.

Snackbar.name: avatar
Snackbar.description: Avatar element rendered on the left (40×40px, rounded-xl). Takes precedence over `icon`. Typically an ``.

Snackbar.name: loading
Snackbar.description: Replaces the left slot with an animated spinner. Takes precedence over `icon` and `avatar`.

Snackbar.name: actionLabel
Snackbar.description: Label for the right-hand text action button (brand accent color). Takes precedence over `onNavigate` and `onClose`.

Snackbar.name: onAction
Snackbar.description: Called when the action text button is clicked.

Snackbar.name: onNavigate
Snackbar.description: Shows a chevron-right icon-button on the right. Takes precedence over `onClose`.

Snackbar.name: onClose
Snackbar.description: Shows a close (×) icon-button on the right. Shown when neither `actionLabel` nor `onNavigate` is provided.

Search.name: showBackButton
Search.description: Replaces the search icon with a back-arrow pill (e.g. for nested screens).

Search.name: onBack
Search.description: Called when the back-button pill is clicked.

Search.name: onClear
Search.description: Called when the clear button is clicked or Escape is pressed while the input has a value. In controlled mode the consumer must reset `value`.

Search.name: placeholder
Search.description: Placeholder text shown when the input is empty. Default `"Buscar"`.

Search.name: containerClassName
Search.description: Extra className applied to the outer wrapper div.

Tag.name: intent
Tag.description: Semantic intent that drives the color palette. Default: `'standard'`.

Tag.name: variant
Tag.description: Visual treatment applied on top of the intent palette. Default: `'pastel'`.

Tag.name: startIcon
Tag.description: Element rendered to the left of the label (icon, emoji, …).

Tag.name: endIcon
Tag.description: Element rendered to the right of the label (icon, dismiss affordance, …).

Checkbox.name: indeterminate
Checkbox.description: Renders the mixed-selection state. Sets the DOM .indeterminate property and adds the data-indeterminate attribute for CSS targeting.

Chip.name: badge
Chip.description: Renders a BadgeNumber at the trailing edge. Pass a count or short string.

Toggle.name: checked
Toggle.description: Whether the toggle is in the on (checked) state.

Select.name: onChange
Select.description: Called with the new value when the user selects an option.

Select.name: label
Select.description: Visible label rendered above the trigger.

Select.name: placeholder
Select.description: Placeholder shown when no value is selected.

Select.name: invalid
Select.description: Marks the field as invalid and applies the error border.

Select.name: skeleton
Select.description: Renders the skeleton loading state. Overrides all other states.

Select.name: helperText
Select.description: Helper text rendered below the trigger.

Select.name: error
Select.description: Error message rendered below the trigger and activates `invalid`.

Select.name: selectionIndicator
Select.description: Renders a selection indicator in each option row: - `'check'`: checkmark on the **right** of the selected option only. - `'radio'`: radio circle on the **left** of every option, filled for the selected one. - `'checkbox'`: checkbox on the **left** of every option, checked for the selected one.

TextArea.name: label
TextArea.description: Visible label rendered above the control.

TextArea.name: helperText
TextArea.description: Helper text rendered below the control in neutral state.

TextArea.name: error
TextArea.description: Error message. When provided activates the invalid visual state.

TextArea.name: visuallyHiddenLabel
TextArea.description: Hides the label visually while keeping it accessible.

TextArea.name: onClear
TextArea.description: When provided a clear button (×) is shown while the field has a value and is not disabled or readOnly. Caller is responsible for clearing the value in this handler.

TextArea.name: containerClassName
TextArea.description: Extra class applied to the outer wrapper div.

Breadcrumb.name: items
Breadcrumb.description: Ordered list of steps. The **last item** is always the current page: rendered non-interactively with `aria-current="page"`. All previous items are rendered as links or buttons.

Breadcrumb.name: onBack
Breadcrumb.description: Handler for the back (‹) button shown when there are ≥ 2 items. When omitted, falls back to the `onClick` of the second-to-last item.

Tabs.name: onChange
Tabs.description: Called when the user selects a different tab.

TabList.name: aria-label
TabList.description: Accessible label for the tab list when there is no visible heading nearby.

Tab.name: startIcon
Tab.description: Icon rendered to the left of the label.

Tab.name: endIcon
Tab.description: Icon rendered to the right of the label.

TabPanel.name: value
TabPanel.description: Must match the `value` of its corresponding `<Tab>`.

Notification.name: intent
Notification.description: Semantic intent — drives background color, text color and default icon.

Notification.name: variant
Notification.description: Visual weight: - `'solid'` — vibrant/dark background, white text (default for success/warning/error/info/ai) - `'pastel'` — light tinted background, colored text The `'default'` intent ignores this prop and always renders a neutral surface.

Notification.name: size
Notification.description: `'lg'` (default) — full-width inline banner. `'sm'` — compact toast style.

Notification.name: icon
Notification.description: Overrides the default intent icon. Pass `null` to hide the icon entirely. Ignored when `image` is provided.

Notification.name: image
Notification.description: Image or avatar rendered in the icon slot (e.g. brand logo, user photo). Takes priority over `icon`.

Notification.name: action
Notification.description: Inline action label shown at the trailing end of the notification (e.g. "Deshacer").

Notification.name: onAction
Notification.description: Called when the user clicks the inline action.

Notification.name: onClose
Notification.description: When provided a dismiss (×) button is rendered.

Notification.name: role
Notification.description: ARIA live region role. Defaults to `'alert'` for `error` intent and `'status'` for all others. Pass `'none'` to opt out of the live region.

SegmentedControl.name: onChange
SegmentedControl.description: Called when a new option is selected.

SegmentedControl.name: aria-label
SegmentedControl.description: Accessible label for the control group (required for screen readers).

SegmentedOption.name: startIcon
SegmentedOption.description: Icon rendered before the label text.

SegmentedOption.name: endIcon
SegmentedOption.description: Icon rendered after the label text.

Card.name: elevation
Card.description: Controls the drop-shadow level. - flat: no shadow, border only (default) - raised: subtle shadow — cards on a surface (0 5px 10px …0.04) - floating: stronger shadow — cards that hover above content (0 6px 14px …0.08)

CardAction.name: description
CardAction.description: Secondary text shown below the title. Hidden when `showDescription` is false.

CardAction.name: selected
CardAction.description: Whether this card is in the selected state. Selected → dark border (`--border-strong`).

CardAction.name: leftSlot
CardAction.description: Slot rendered on the left of the text content. Pass design-system primitives (`Checkbox`, `Radio`, icons…) as **decorative** mirrors of state — the card handles the click, not the slot control. Pass `null` to render nothing.

CardAction.name: rightSlot
CardAction.description: Slot rendered on the right of the card. Pass `null` to render nothing.

ComboBox.name: options
ComboBox.description: All available options. Filtered internally by `inputValue` when uncontrolled.

ComboBox.name: value
ComboBox.description: Currently selected values (multi-select). An empty array means "nothing selected".

ComboBox.name: inputValue
ComboBox.description: Controlled search text. When provided, filtering is delegated to the consumer (useful for async / server-side search). When omitted, ComboBox filters internally.

ComboBox.name: invalid
ComboBox.description: Marks the field as visually invalid (red border). Overridden when `error` is set.

ComboBox.name: leftIcon
ComboBox.description: Icon rendered on the left of the input field (24×24).

ComboBox.name: size
ComboBox.description: `'lg'` — desktop, 56 px height, 16 px font (body-lg). `'sm'` — mobile, 44 px height, 14 px font (body-md).

ComboBox.name: clearable
ComboBox.description: Show a clear (×) button when the input has text.

ComboBox.name: onClear
ComboBox.description: Called when the user clicks the clear button.

ComboBox.name: skeleton
ComboBox.description: Renders the skeleton loading state — overrides all other states.

Drawer.name: open
Drawer.description: Controls whether the modal drawer is visible.

Drawer.name: title
Drawer.description: Accessible title displayed in the fixed header.

Drawer.name: onClose
Drawer.description: Called by the close button, Escape key, or scrim click.

Drawer.name: closeLabel
Drawer.description: Accessible label for the icon-only close action.

Drawer.name: showFooter
Drawer.description: Shows the docked action region from the Figma component.

Drawer.name: showPrimaryAction
Drawer.description: Shows the primary action in the footer.

Drawer.name: showSecondaryAction
Drawer.description: Shows the supporting action before the primary action.

Drawer.name: closeOnScrimClick
Drawer.description: Allows consumers to keep the drawer open when the scrim is clicked.

EmptyState.name: description
EmptyState.defaultValue: Se produjo un error, vuelve a intentarlo.

EmptyState.name: size
EmptyState.description: `'md'` — compact (48 px icon, body-lg title, caption description). `'lg'` — full-page (144 px icon, h2 title, body description). Text renders ABOVE the icon.

EmptyState.name: skeleton
EmptyState.description: Renders skeleton loading placeholders instead of real content.

EmptyState.name: icon
EmptyState.description: Icon rendered inside the circle illustration. Defaults to `<Unplug />` (disconnect icon). Pass `null` to render no icon.

EmptyState.name: showAction
EmptyState.description: Whether to show the action button.

EmptyState.name: action
EmptyState.description: Custom action element. When omitted a secondary "Reintentar" button is rendered.

EmptyState.name: actionLabel
EmptyState.description: Label for the default action button. Only used when `action` is not provided.

EmptyState.name: onAction
EmptyState.description: Click handler for the default action button.

CardTable.name: selectionControl
CardTable.description: Dedicated leading region for row selection.

CardTable.name: actions
CardTable.description: Explicit controls only. At most two actions are rendered.

TableCell.name: leading
TableCell.description: Optional element rendered before the text block.

TableCell.name: title
TableCell.description: Optional emphasized line above the main content.

TableCell.name: trailing
TableCell.description: Optional element rendered after the text block.

TableCell.name: align
TableCell.description: Logical alignment that remains correct in RTL layouts.

TableHeaderCell.name: leading
TableHeaderCell.description: Optional element rendered before the text block.

TableHeaderCell.name: title
TableHeaderCell.description: Optional emphasized line above the main content.

TableHeaderCell.name: trailing
TableHeaderCell.description: Optional element rendered after the text block.

TableHeaderCell.name: align
TableHeaderCell.description: Logical alignment that remains correct in RTL layouts.

DataTable.name: ariaLabel
DataTable.description: Accessible name for the native table.

DataTable.name: caption
DataTable.description: Optional visible or screen-reader caption for the native table.
